Services & Investment

Investment in Art

Bespoke collections tailored for editorial beauty. Rates and coverage options are customized and negotiated directly over the phone.

Selected Unions

Weddings & Elopements

Rates

Negotiated over phone

Cinematic visual narratives documenting wedding pre-shoots, ceremony highlights, fine-art couple sessions, and details.

Typical Deliverables
  • Custom high-resolution digital gallery
  • Optional luxury layflat albums
  • Custom coverage timeline plan
Available Options
  • •Tailored hourly packages
  • •Lead + second photographer options
  • •Pre-wedding consultation & timeline planning
Inquire Details
Creative Sessions

Editorial Portraits

Rates

Negotiated over phone

Striking individual sessions, fashion editorials, and commercial branding collections that emphasize authentic character.

Typical Deliverables
  • High-res retouched digital files
  • Creative direction & styling support
  • Bespoke print package options
Available Options
  • •Studio or outdoor lighting setups
  • •Multiple outfit changes
  • •Creative storyboard planning
Inquire Details
Documentary Coverage

Milestones & Birthdays

Rates

Negotiated over phone

Candid and elegant coverage of family reunions, anniversaries, corporate launches, and birthday celebrations.

Typical Deliverables
  • Curated digital downloads
  • Online gallery sharing link
  • Rapid sneak-peek turnaround
Available Options
  • •Documentary-style candid capture
  • •Group portrait coordination
  • •Full digital downloads
Inquire Details
Product & Fashion Campaigns

Commercial & Branding

Rates

Negotiated over phone

Custom campaigns, product catalogs, lifestyle lookbooks, and high-end imagery tailored for editorial prints and platforms.

Typical Deliverables
  • Commercial licensing permissions
  • High-res & web-optimized delivery
  • Full digital asset suite
Available Options
  • •Commercial lighting & staging setups
  • •Product styling & detail framing
  • •Custom usage licenses
Inquire Details
The Experience

Your Journey with Us

We design a smooth, premium experience from the first click to the final gallery delivery.

01

Inquire

Select service type, pick your preferred date, and share your vision in our secure calendar form.

02

Consult

We connect to refine styling guidelines, decide location backdrops, and outline the timeline.

03

The Shoot

A relaxed session focused on natural poses, raw smiles, and beautiful play of lighting.

04

Art Edit

We review all shots frame by frame, color grading details to match our editorial signature.

05

Gallery

Receive your private digital gallery download link and option to order custom art prints.

FAQ

Common Questions

For portrait and lifestyle sessions, we recommend booking 4 to 6 weeks in advance. For weddings and elopements, we typically book 6 to 12 months in advance as we limit our schedule to ensure exceptional, bespoke quality.
Absolutely! We love photographing stories in new settings. Travel within Colombo is included. For destination shoots in Sri Lanka (Galle, Kandy, Ella, etc.) or internationally, we charge standard travel expenses and accommodation fee guidelines.
For portrait and event sessions, you will receive your final gallery within 2 to 3 weeks. For weddings and elopements, the curation and fine-art color work takes 6 to 8 weeks. We always send a 10-image sneak peek within 48 hours of your shoot!
No, we do not deliver raw files. The curation and editing are key parts of our signature editorial style. We select the best frames that capture genuine emotion and color-grade them to perfection, delivering a polished and coherent narrative.
We understand that life is unpredictable. You may reschedule your session up to 14 days before your date without penalty. For weather-dependent outdoor shoots, we track the forecast closely and will coordinate a reschedule if rain or high winds interfere.

Have a unique project in mind?

We love crafting custom sessions. Let us know what you want to build and we will send a tailored estimate.

Get Custom Quote

Capturing pure emotion, editorial portraits, and fine-art lifestyle photography with quiet elegance.
